# Freundlich Model

**Summary**: An empirical model for multi-layer adsorption on heterogeneous surfaces.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] applied Freundlich models to evaluate the adsorption behavior of Hg (II) and As (III).

## Key Results and Findings

- The Freundlich model showed a high correlation for Hg (II) with an R^2 of 0.9994. ([[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009, p. 97]])
